steps.title: Rewrite each equation for $y$
steps.content: From $x^2+y+7=7$, subtract $x^2$ to get $$y=-x^2.$$ From $20x+100-y=0$, add $y$ to both sides to get $$y=20x+100.$$

steps.title: Set the expressions equal
steps.content: At the solution, both expressions equal $y$, so $$-x^2=20x+100.$$ Move everything to one side: $$x^2+20x+100=0.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The graphs touch at one point with x-coordinate $-10$, so the value of $x$ is -10.
